underlying_goal: Set up foundational infrastructure (database schema, configuration management, logging) for a Go SIA alarm receiver project, working through a series of Jira tickets
friction_detail: Claude initially over-engineered config with Viper/hot-reload that the user progressively stripped away; CI failures from wrong secret names and uncommitted go mod tidy; linter tool name was wrong on first attempt for Neovim config.
brief_summary: User worked through multiple Jira tickets (database schema, YAML config, logging) for a Go alarm receiver project with iterative simplification, and largely achieved their goals despite some over-engineering and CI friction.
